_comment: Pairwise task EXAMPLE — student-facing format. The 5 reference_tasks/task_pair_*.json files include extra fields (clean_code, buggy_code, tricky_code, bugs_*) used by the reference skills + run_dev.py self-grading. This file shows the minimal shape an evaluator only needs.
task_description: Implement reverse_words(s): given a string of space-separated words, return the words reversed in order, preserving single-space separators. Empty string returns ''. Multiple consecutive spaces should collapse to one.
